coupon.source_phrase_block: Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation (see additional instructions below). Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 2 people at $12 per person (children under 16 free). Additional instructions: - Pre-registration is recommended. Visit the Peabody Essex Museum website and enter the e-code into the “Promo Code” field to reserve. -To access your e-code, click "Access Pass" in your confirmation email. The e-code is found under the barcode. -If purchasing upon arrival, present pass reservation confirmation email to receive discount.
